name: io.github.foundrynet/forge-mcp
title: Forge by Foundry Labs — Industrial Machine Intelligence
description: Connect any AI agent to industrial equipment. Forge normalizes cross-manufacturer machine telemetry into one canonical schema so an agent can read, reason over, and act on data from any of 18 OEM families. 30 MCP tools for machine identity, normalization, history, plain-English automation, TimesFM prediction (forecast, threshold-breach, remaining-life, batch + fleet health, anomaly detection, full-stack machine intelligence), operations analytics (OEE, energy, shift reports, diagnostics), and tamper-evident work attestation.
